normalization_point: East Sea gas discovery is Stage 1 price-path evidence, not Stage 3 proof before drilling and commerciality.
Drill-bit gates prevent resource estimates from becoming Stage 3 before commercial reserves exist.
Energy-security policy can be Stage 1/2, but company revenue or margin path is required.
Short-selling policy is a market-structure overlay, not individual company Green evidence.
High-beta short-ban rallies are 4B/4C watch unless fundamentals confirm.
Political system shock is a market-wide RedTeam overlay that temporarily cuts valuation room.
Korea is an energy importer; Hormuz or Middle East shock is a market-wide 4C overlay.
R11 explicitly records event price rallies but blocks Stage 3 unless cash-flow evidence appears.
The same policy can help or hurt different baskets; wrong beneficiary mapping must cap Green.
R11 headlines stay capped when budget, contract, order, exploration result, or guidance detail is missing.
